subject: A gorgon with snake hair stands over a fallen armored figure, holding a flower stem as a weapon in a subterranean setting
description: A figure with clearly visible serpentine hair — snakes in place of conventional hair, identifying this as a gorgon — looms over a heavily armored opponent who has fallen backward against a rubble-strewn wall. The gorgon holds a long-stemmed flower (a rose or similar bloom with a visible bud) and appears to be pressing it against the armored figure in an act of contemptuous violence. The setting is a subterranean tunnel or alley with rough stone walls and iron bars visible to the right. The palette is muted grey-olive with warm skin tones on the gorgon. The armored figure's bulky plate mail with horned helmet indicates a soldier or guard. A second flower or bloom lies to the lower right, suggesting it may have already been used as a weapon.
foreground: Gorgon with snake hair holding a flower stem, standing over a fallen armored figure against rubble
background: Subterranean stone tunnel with rubble, iron bars to the right
emotion: contemptuous dominance from the gorgon; collapse and defeat from the armored figure
